data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the requirement that substitute employees can attend, but the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that anyone from the company can attend, there is no direct evidence or API validation to support this claim, indicating a gap in the requirement validation. The absence of specific evidence to confirm the ability for substitute employees to attend classes constitutes a failure to meet the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API functionality or state checks confirming that substitute employees can attend.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API validation for substitute employee attendance
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system allows substitute employees to attend sessions.
